summary: Tested new features: Login help text, Donate/Return preference in consignment forms, Admin Lock/Unlock account feature, and Password Management section. All backend API tests (13) and frontend E2E tests (8) passed.
seed_data_creation: Created test consignment agreements with rejected_items_preference field during backend API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Login help text visible on Employee and Consignor login screens, 2) Donate/Return preference options visible in consignment agreement form with 'Returned to me' and 'Donated' buttons, 3) Admin Password Management section has lock/unlock buttons for both employees and consignors, 4) Password reset API endpoints working correctly. The lock account feature prevents locked users from logging in with proper error message.

login_help_text.details: Help text 'Need more help logging in? Send a message from the homepage.' visible on both Employee Portal (/login) and Consignor login screens

donate_or_return_preference.details: Consignment agreement form shows 'Returned to me' and 'Donated' options with data-testid='preference-return' and data-testid='preference-donate'. Default is 'return'. Backend accepts rejected_items_preference field.

admin_lock_unlock_accounts.details: Password Management section in Admin Dashboard shows lock/unlock buttons for both Employees and Consignors tabs. Admin accounts cannot be locked (403 error). Locked accounts receive 'Your account has been locked' error on login attempt.

password_reset_email.details: Password reset request endpoint (/api/password-reset/request) working for both employee and consignor user types. Rate limiting and token validation endpoints functional.

admin_form_review_preference.details: Admin can access Form Submissions section. The rejected_items_preference field is stored in consignment agreements and available for admin review.
